title: chloraea reticulata
intro: Chloraea reticulata, also known as the net orchid or New Zealand net orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Chloraea reticulata lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Chloraea reticulata is often prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and its health benefits include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function.
